data.body:
Tomorrow is CM Arcie’s 30th live stream, Sensei – We’ll be featuring a SPECIAL GUEST this time!
We hope you’ll join us for our final stream of 2025! 🌟
 
 🗓️Date & Time: 12/24 (Wed) 1:00 AM (UTC)
 ➡️YouTube Link: https://youtube.com/live/gvKWgS6fyuY
